questions.question: What is the output of the command `ls -l | grep keyword`?
questions.hint: Explain the effect of piping the `ls -l` command to `grep keyword`

questions.question: Write a command to redirect the output of the command `ls -l | grep keyword` to a file called `output.txt`?
questions.hint: Explain the use of the pipe and redirection operators

questions.question: What is the difference between `ls -l | grep keyword` and `ls keyword`?
questions.hint: Explain the effect of piping the `ls -l` command to `grep keyword`
